full_text:
The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated with: 19.4 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 400 µl Dispase + 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, RBC lysis with 4 ml for 5 min + 20 ml DMEM/F12+++, and a second time with 2 mL of RBC lysis buffer and 10 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media. After RBC lysis and centrifugation, the final pellet was resuspended in 5 ml of media and counted.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

8 cryovials of 5E6 cells each were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker

Flow cytometry

From the original cell suspension, 8 aliquots of 1.5 E6 cells each were made in 1.5 mL eppendorfs.

The conditions to stain were:

CD3 FMO

CD8 FMO

EpCAM FMO

DCM FMO

CD11c FMO

CD56 FMO

CD14 FMO

Fully stained sample

The aliquots were stained with the antibodies from the drug testing panel according to the protocol.

Opened and used a new antibody vial: PE-Cy™7 Mouse anti-Ki-67, cat# 561283, Lot 3152149.

iPDC culture

8 conditions, 12 replicates/condition = 96 wells

96 wells * 40 uL = 3840 uL -> round to 4000 uL

Make six separate tubes each one of 800 uL (approx. 4000 uL/4)

0.8E6 cells / (23.4 cells/mL) = 34.2 uL (from the original cell suspension)

The amount of the remaining components per tube will be:

ORG full medium: 568.2 uL

Omentum gel: 176.8 uL

Aprotinin: 2.4 uL

Thrombin: 2.4 uL

Fibrinogen: 16 uL

The conditions to test were:

CD3 FMO

CD8 FMO

EpCAM FMO

DCM FMO

CD11c FMO

CD56 FMO

CD14 FMO

Fully stained sample

with 12 replicates (well) per condition

After the droplets were seeded in the ultra-low attachment 48 well plates (Greiner), polymerization was allowed to happen for 1 h. After that, 400 uL of iPDC media + cytokines were added into each well. Unfortunately, many of the droplets detached after media addition. Since this happened in the previous attempt of this experiment, it might be related to the new batch of ome-gel, or to the aprotinin, thrombin, and/or fibrinogen aliquots being past the expiration date. Despite this, the experiment will continue and the results will be evaluated.
